s1.title: Acceptance of Terms
s1.body: By accessing or using BookProof ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Platform.

s2.title: Service Description
s2.intro: BookProof is a platform that connects Authors with Readers for the purpose of generating authentic book reviews on Amazon. Our services include:
items: Credit-based review campaign management for Authors
Book distribution to qualified Readers
Review tracking and verification
Affiliate program for marketing partners

s3.title: User Accounts
s3.intro: To use our Platform, you must create an account and provide accurate information. You are responsible for:
items: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
All activities that occur under your account
Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use

s4.title: Author Terms
s4.intro: As an Author, you agree to:
items: Only submit books that you own or have rights to distribute
Provide accurate book information and Amazon links
Purchase credits through our official payment system
Not attempt to manipulate or incentivize specific review content
Accept that reviews are honest opinions of Readers

s5.title: Reader Terms
s5.intro: As a Reader, you agree to:
items: Read assigned books completely before reviewing
Submit honest, unbiased reviews based on your experience
Post reviews on Amazon within the specified deadline
Not accept payment from Authors outside the Platform
Maintain a valid Amazon account in good standing

items.label: Credits
items.text: Authors purchase credits to fund review campaigns. Credits are non-refundable except as specified in our refund policy.

items.label: Reader Payments
items.text: Readers are compensated for verified reviews according to the current payment rates displayed on the Platform.

items.label: Affiliate Commissions
items.text: Affiliates earn commissions based on qualified referrals as outlined in the Affiliate Program terms.

s7.title: Prohibited Activities
items: Submit fake reviews or manipulate review content
Create multiple accounts for fraudulent purposes
Share account credentials with others
Attempt to circumvent Platform security measures
Violate Amazon's Terms of Service
Engage in harassment or abusive behavior

s8.title: Termination
s8.intro: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms. Upon termination:
items: Unused credits may be forfeited
Pending payouts may be withheld pending investigation
Access to the Platform will be revoked

s9.title: Limitation of Liability
s9.intro: BookProof is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for:
items: Reviews posted or removed by Amazon
Actions taken by Amazon regarding user accounts
Loss of data or service interruptions
Indirect, incidental, or consequential damages

s10.title: Changes to Terms
s10.body: We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
